title: I.U.C.N. Update Says Deep-Sea Mining Threatens Mollusks Around Hydrothermal Vents
summary_full: The snails and other mollusks around hydrothermal vents have evolved to thrive in extreme conditions, but mineral extraction could drive more than half to extinction.
summary_public: The snails and other mollusks around hydrothermal vents have evolved to thrive in extreme conditions, but mineral extraction could drive more than half to extinction.
